title: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Earnings Estimates, Revenue Estimates
text: BigBear.ai (BBAI) earnings and revenue estimates on Seeking Alpha. Consensus estimates show Q2 2026 EPS of -$0.05 and full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $135-165M. The estimates reflect analyst expectations for continued near-term losses balanced against long-term growth potential. Monitoring estimate revisions provides insight into changing analyst sentiment.
